title: High-level WBS for initial rough order of magnitude estimates
overview: Explains how a high-level WBS can support early ROM schedule and budget planning.
detailed_summary: A final version of the WBS is not required before producing an initial schedule or budget. A high-level WBS developed early in scope elaboration can provide a high-level understanding of deliverables that is often sufficient to substantiate a rough order of magnitude (ROM) schedule and budget. The focus should remain on deliverables, not activities.
content: Projects often need early schedule and budget estimates before the WBS is fully decomposed. In such cases, a high-level WBS can provide enough scope definition to support ROM planning. This early WBS should still be deliverables-based and should document the major outputs expected from the project. As the WBS is refined, the schedule and budget can be refined as well.
relationships: Detailed WBS supports more detailed planning
search_queries: Can you estimate with a high-level WBS?
Do you need a final WBS for initial budget?
What supports ROM schedule and budget estimates?
common_questions: Is a complete WBS required for an initial estimate?
What level of WBS detail supports ROM planning?
How early should a WBS be created?
can_answer: Whether a full WBS is required for early estimates
How a high-level WBS supports ROM estimates
How to keep early WBS planning focused
examples: A top-level mountain bike WBS can support an initial ROM schedule and budget even before every subcomponent is decomposed.
best_practices: Create a high-level WBS as early as possible in scope elaboration.
Explicitly label early estimates as rough order of magnitude when based on high-level deliverables only.
warnings: Do not treat ROM figures derived from a high-level WBS as fully detailed commitments.
limitations: A high-level WBS cannot justify fine-grained schedule logic or detailed cost allocations.
troubleshooting: If early estimates lack credibility, verify that major deliverable categories are captured in the high-level WBS.
decision_rules: Use a high-level WBS for ROM estimates when detailed decomposition is not yet complete.
